beats.full_text: Trying to outrun burnout usually makes the loop more expensive. More checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.
beats.ssot_text: Trying to outrun burnout usually makes the loop more expensive: more checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.

beats.speakable_text: Trying to outrun burnout usually makes the loop more expensive. More checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.

beats.full_text: Burnout often persists because a tired nervous system stops responding to pressure like a performance tool. More pressure can register as more threat, even when the intention is improvement.
beats.ssot_text: Burnout often persists because a tired nervous system stops responding to pressure like a performance tool. More pressure can register as more threat, even when the intention is improvement.

beats.speakable_text: Burnout often persists because a tired nervous system stops responding to pressure like a performance tool. More pressure can register as more threat, even when the intention is improvement.

beats.full_text: Try this. Close the loop, lower your jaw. And take three slow double-inhale sighs before choosing the next task. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.
beats.ssot_text: Try this: close the loop, lower your jaw, and take three slow double-inhale sighs before choosing the next task. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

beats.full_text: Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. Rest is a recovery input, not a reward for perfect output.
